feed.title: A Bitcoin-native LLM: dataset, architecture and open questions

entry.title: A Bitcoin-native LLM: dataset, architecture and open questions
entry.summary: The email received raises concerns about the tone of a post, suggesting that it appears self-promoting. The sender is inquiring if there are any specific contributions or clarifications that should be added to the discussion to provide more value or relevance. This interaction emphasizes the importance of maintaining a focus on meaningful content in discussions rather than personal promotion.
